properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: They did not understand why He wouldn't come As they made their way toward the other side As they left the shore, they faced the storm And suddenly they feared for their lives.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But upon the sea there someone walked On the water, as they listened for His cry That's when they heared Him call out their names And tenderly He said, It is I.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He's the I of the storm The center of my calm The place where I find shelter The place where I find warmth The center of my ways The keeper of my days When I can't feel the sun shine And my ship is tossed and torn He's the I of the storm

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: They did not understand how the Prince of Peace Could find them in the middle of the sea But with little faith and God's good grace Joy would overcome their desperate pleas

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Now there are times in life when I face the storm And I wonder if I ever will survive That's when I hear Him call out my name And tenderly He says, It is I.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Do not fear when He is near Take hold of His strong hand Listen closely to His word He's the Great I Am

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: The Great I Am still is The heavens and the earth are His He's the mercyful Almighty forever holy In everything we must remember this The Great I Am still is

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: The I of the storm The center of my calm The place where I find shelter The place where I find warmth The center of my ways The keeper of my days When I can't feel the sun shine And my ship is tossed and torn He's the I of the storm He's the I of the storm
